servers.name: Wallet Intelligence Meta-Aggregator MCP (x402)
servers.description: Pay-per-call x402 META-aggregator: composes 7 EVM wallet-intelligence services in parallel into one wallet dossier (labels, portfolio risk, DeFi health, MEV exposure, approvals risk, CEX flows, funding trace). Single endpoint, fail-soft per axis. Live on Cloudflare Workers. No signup, no API key — pay USDC on Base.

authentication.credentials: Pay-per-call via x402 USDC on Base — no signup, no API key. Each call returns 402 with an EXACT-scheme requirement; agents pay 0x1664530DC2A1CA350B1dbaD1Fc1F1a70c90fe4de in Base USDC and retry with X-PAYMENT.

tools.name: /v1/wallet/dossier
tools.description: 7-axis EVM wallet dossier (labels, portfolio_risk, defi_health, mev_exposure, approvals_risk, cex_flows, funding_trace). Per-axis source_url + ok + latency_ms. Fail-soft. $0.75.

tools.name: /v1/wallet/dossier_summary
tools.description: Plain-English 2-paragraph summary of the same 7-axis fan-out. $0.50.
